title: jasione humilis subsp. centralis
intro: Jasione humilis subsp. centralis, also known as the lesser cornflower, is a plant species within the Jasione genus and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Jasione humilis subsp. centralis include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, salves, and tinctures, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
